O

onCardPlayed(IPlayer, Card, int) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.listeners.GameEventAdapter
Called after any player successfully plays a card.
onCardPlayed(IPlayer, Card, int) - Method in interface com.trifasico.x50zo.model.listeners.IGameEventListener
Called after any player successfully plays a card.
onDeckReshuffled() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.listeners.GameEventAdapter
Called when the deck runs out and the table pile is reshuffled into a new draw pile, so the UI can show a brief indicator.
onDeckReshuffled() - Method in interface com.trifasico.x50zo.model.listeners.IGameEventListener
Called when the deck runs out and the table pile is reshuffled into a new draw pile, so the UI can show a brief indicator.
onError(Exception) - Method in interface com.trifasico.x50zo.controller.MachinePlayThread.ErrorHandler
Called on the JavaFX Application Thread when an unrecoverable exception occurs during the machine's turn.
onExitClicked() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.controller.GameController
Terminates the application gracefully.
onGameOver(IPlayer) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.listeners.GameEventAdapter
Called once when the game ends.
onGameOver(IPlayer) - Method in interface com.trifasico.x50zo.model.listeners.IGameEventListener
Called once when the game ends.
onHomeClicked() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.controller.GameController
Redirects the user back to the main menu view.
onKeyPressed(KeyEvent) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.controller.GameController
Captures and processes keyboard events to allow non-mouse gameplay during a human turn.
onPlayerEliminated(IPlayer) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.listeners.GameEventAdapter
Called when a player cannot make a legal move and is eliminated.
onPlayerEliminated(IPlayer) - Method in interface com.trifasico.x50zo.model.listeners.IGameEventListener
Called when a player cannot make a legal move and is eliminated.
onPlayError(Exception) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.controller.MachineThinkingTask
Called on the JavaFX Application Thread when an unexpected checked exception occurs during machinePlayCard().
onTurnStarted(IPlayer) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.listeners.GameEventAdapter
Called at the start of each turn to signal which player must act next.
onTurnStarted(IPlayer) - Method in interface com.trifasico.x50zo.model.listeners.IGameEventListener
Called at the start of each turn to signal which player must act next.
